title: Update pharmacy contact details with real information

requirements.text: Update the village/area reference throughout the site to 'Kalaiya 10' wherever a village or locality name appears (hero section, homepage copy, footer, contact page, about page, and any other location).
acceptanceCriteria: The text 'Kalaiya 10' appears as the village/locality name in the hero section headline or subheading
Footer contact details show 'Kalaiya 10' as part of the address
No generic placeholder village name remains anywhere in the UI

requirements.text: Update the pharmacy phone number to '9824284662' everywhere it appears: the FloatingActionBar Call Now tel: link, the WhatsApp wa.me link, the Navigation 'Call Now' CTA button, the Footer contact section, and the Contact page contact info cards.
acceptanceCriteria: The Call Now button links to 'tel:9824284662'
The WhatsApp button links to 'https://wa.me/9779824284662' (Nepal country code prefix)
The phone number '9824284662' is displayed in the footer and contact page
No old placeholder phone number remains anywhere in the UI

requirements.text: Update the full mailing/location address displayed in the Footer and Contact page to 'Kalaiya 10, Bara, Nepal'.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays the address 'Kalaiya 10, Bara, Nepal'
Contact page address info card shows 'Kalaiya 10, Bara, Nepal'

requirements.text: Update the pharmacist/owner name displayed on the About Us page and any other page where a staff member or owner name appears to 'Ahsan Ansari'.
acceptanceCriteria: The name 'Ahsan Ansari' appears in the About Us team/staff section
No generic placeholder staff name (e.g., 'Pharmacist Name') remains visible on any page

requirements.text: Update the SEO meta tags in frontend/index.html to incorporate the real location details: update the meta title to include 'Kalaiya, Bara, Nepal' and the meta description and keywords to reference 'Kalaiya 10, Bara' naturally.
acceptanceCriteria: The HTML <title> tag references 'Kalaiya' or 'Bara, Nepal'
The meta description mentions 'Kalaiya 10, Bara' or similar specific location

constraints: Do not change the 'Arogya' pharmacy brand name — only update location, phone, address, and staff name details
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
WhatsApp link must use Nepal's international dialing code (+977) prefix before the local number
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or color theme
Modifying backend data models or stored inquiries
